research_question: Does sampling temperature increase bounded process-trace diversity among valid outcome-equivalent artifacts?
motivation_literature: Lee et al. 2025; Hong et al. 2024; TURN 2025; INVERT preflight monoculture at T=0
dataset_source: Family1 tasks JSON (existing); new gen only
prompts: Named pole prompts; T in {0,0.4,0.8,1.0}; 20 reps per cell
metrics: trace_fingerprint richness, Shannon H, Simpson, valid_rate, recovery_rate
claim_if_positive: Higher T yields higher process H on C/D/E without adapter changes
claim_if_null: T>0 does not increase process diversity; supports generative monoculture under equivalence
risks: Detector unchanged; diversity may appear only on E randomized pole again
go_no_go_criterion: GO if >=2 dynamic classes show H increase at T>=0.8 for >=2 models with valid_rate>=0.5

research_question: When prompts omit explicit pole names do LLMs default to measurable process poles?
motivation_literature: Kirk 2024 monoculture; INVERT threats (prompt-named poles); architecture NFR literature
dataset_source: Family1 tasks with neutral prompt template
prompts: Neutral: implement task without naming eager/lazy/BFS/DFS/deterministic; 10 reps T=0
metrics: pole_distribution, default_pole_rate, valid_rate, entropy of assigned poles
claim_if_positive: Models show stable default process biases differing by model family
claim_if_null: Uniform or random pole distribution; no measurable bias
risks: Task stubs may still imply pole; neutral prompt may reduce validity
go_no_go_criterion: GO if >=2 models show >=70% default to one pole on >=2 classes with valid_rate>=0.4

research_question: Do reasoning-capable models produce different process traces than coder models at matched validity?
models: qwen2.5-coder:14b vs deepseek-r1 / qwen3 thinking (if available)
metrics: trace fingerprints, pole recovery, cross-model divergence
claim_if_positive: Reasoning models shift quantity/order/variability traces at equal validity
claim_if_null: No process-trace difference beyond recovery rate
risks: Reasoning models may be API-only or slow; construct validity if models differ in size not type
go_no_go_criterion: GO if >=2 classes show significant fingerprint divergence between pairs at matched valid_n>=30

research_question: Does pass@k / self-consistency selection reduce process diversity among correct samples?
prompts: Named pole; generate k samples; select first valid or majority-output cluster
claim_if_positive: Selection collapses process diversity even when pass@k rises
claim_if_null: Diversity preserved after selection; weak collapse claim
risks: Output-cluster selection != standard pass@k; may conflate output and process
go_no_go_criterion: GO if median diversity_loss>=0.3 bits for >=2 classes

research_question: Does automated repair to pass behavioral gate preserve or alter process signatures?
dataset_source: Invalid artifacts from frozen pilots + new invalid gen
prompts: Single-pass model repair or rule fixer; compare trace pre/post on newly valid
claim_if_positive: Repair often flips or homogenizes process poles while fixing tests
claim_if_null: Repair preserves process pole in majority of cases
risks: Repair may fail to produce valid code; model repair is generation not annotation
go_no_go_criterion: GO if >=15% of repaired-valid artifacts flip process pole or fingerprint

research_question: Do code-specialized models show stronger process monoculture than base instruct models?
motivation_literature: Code Llama 2023; Hong 2024 instruction tuning reduces diversity
models: base instruct vs coder variant pairs (same family)
claim_if_positive: Specialization reduces process diversity at equal validity
claim_if_null: No difference; specialization affects validity only
risks: Matched pairs hard to find in Ollama; size confound
go_no_go_criterion: GO if coder model richness <= 0.5 * base richness on >=2 classes

research_question: Does increasing model size reduce or increase process trace diversity?
motivation_literature: Lee 2025 model size analysis; Qwen2.5-Coder scaling
claim_if_null: Larger models more diverse or no trend
risks: Size covaries with training; Ollama may lack 7b
go_no_go_criterion: GO if monotonic richness-size trend with r^2>=0.5 across >=3 sizes

research_question: Are model process biases correlated across quantity/order/variability classes?
motivation_literature: INVERT discussion axis conjecture; empirical SE coupling
prompts: Use frozen detection fingerprints per model
claim_if_positive: Models strong on lazy also BFS-biased etc.
risks: Preflight monoculture limits signal; coupling may be artifact of survival
go_no_go_criterion: GO if |rho|>=0.5 between >=2 class pairs for >=3 models

research_question: Does increasing repetitions reveal latent process diversity at T=0 without temperature change?
motivation_literature: INVERT preflight N=5; pass@k sample size literature
prompts: Named pole T=0; compare N=5 vs N=30
metrics: richness at N=5 vs N=30, rare archetype rate
claim_if_positive: Rare traces appear only at high N
risks: Expensive generation; may replicate E-randomized only
go_no_go_criterion: GO if N=30 richness >= 2x N=5 for >=2 deterministic poles

research_question: Does chat/instruct tuning collapse process traces relative to base checkpoints?
claim_if_positive: Instruct models lower process H at equal valid rate
risks: Base models may not be available in Ollama
go_no_go_criterion: GO if instruct richness < base on >=3 classes
